citations.narrative:
The record of animals on hand was not up to date. It is important to keep an accurate record of animals on hand in case
of emergency or escape, and for trace back purposes.
Record of Animals on Hand and Record of Acquisition, Disposition, or Transport of Animals are forms used by dealers
and exhibitors to keep and maintain the information required by paragraph §2.75(b)(1). Correct by June 3, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
